summary: Raw yfinance statements + on-demand metric engine + Finnhub websocket live price. Verified live: refresh wrote 9 periods, statements return cents + computed gross_margin, metrics compute roe/net_margin/debt_to_equity/revenue_cagr_3y on demand (pe null without live price), unknown metric -> 422, price -> 503 when markets closed. 32 new unit/router tests pass; full suite 248 passed (2 pre-existing unrelated Alpaca MCP-path failures). ruff + strict mypy + mandate gate green.
